global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with an enticing offer.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and lively atmosphere.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'PlateSprint' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small icon or badge labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, located near the top.

elements.label: Food images
elements.description: Three stylized images of food items arranged horizontally, suggesting a variety of meal options.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: A single stylized image of a food item, visually appealing and centered within the ad.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: Another stylized image of a food item, colorful and enticing, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: A third stylized image of a food item, designed to attract attention and evoke cravings.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: A small, appealing image of a food item, designed to complement the other food images.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: Another small, enticing image of a food item, adding variety to the visual presentation.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: A small, colorful image of a food item, enhancing the overall food theme of the ad.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a price tag of '€2900' prominently displayed.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered €2900 Jable Get offer

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer', designed to encourage user interaction.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC', serving as a decorative element to highlight user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by food images in the center, and the main offer text at the bottom with a CTA button.
